title: Integrate the swarm visual into the landing page
description:
Place the animated swarm visual into the repositioned landing page. Blocked-by both the reposition tick (cbw, owns landing.ts structure) and the swarm-module tick (rt3, provides the component) — both edit/produce inputs this needs, so it runs after they merge.

Do: import { swarmSection } from './swarm-visual' in cloud/worker/src/landing.ts and render it as a prominent section directly beneath the hero + above-the-fold differentiator strip (it is the proof of the orchestration claim). Match surrounding section spacing/responsive rules.

CONTRACT: consume the 'swarmSection' string export from rt3. VERIFY: cd cloud/worker && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit; load the page and confirm the visual animates (and the reduced-motion static fallback works).
acceptance_criteria: landing.ts imports swarmSection from ./swarm-visual and renders it as a headline section directly under the hero/above-the-fold strip; page renders with the animation; cd cloud/worker && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit clean
closed_reason: Completed: imported swarmSection into landing.ts and placed the animated swarm visual directly under the hero, above #features
